feed.title: 9GAG
feed.subtitle: Hot posts from 9gag.com (no native feed; parsed from the page's window._config JSON). NSFW posts are tagged [NSFW].

entry.title: Years pass. Friendships remain. The chaos stays exactly the same.
The problem is that I don't have a GF
Norway's soccer team is serious about their food choices for the World Cup
Just a normal day with friends, until it's not
True love and dedication. He never gave up on finding justice for her.
I've never come this way before. It's the cobblestones.
Never, never, ever, ever do this
That escalated quickly
Even if you won the lottery today, you would never be able to buy that feeling in your life
Unit Magic.
I knew he was a talented dog but damn...
When a helicopter pilot plays video games
Stop being such snowflakes
I thought they're called jurassic world?
Yo Thanks Mate
Old NZ hilux ad
Glass houses and stone throwing, a classic political move
Guys Agartha is real
Have you seen the High Elves
The worst she can say is no
What emoji?
So deep...
Who's gonna know
Seriously WTF happened to the Bermuda Triangle? Nobody talks about it anymore Did they solve the problem? Was it Aliens? Was it Atlantis? I need answers Damn it
This is an insane amount of info for a short... Anyway do what you do and comment deck jokes...
Messi does not play early or late, he plays precisely when he needs to
Dont even know about next week
Pole Position
The series we've been missing... (Indonesian series "Man-Tiger")
Bobby Prince, the composer of many legendary game musics including Doom, Doom II and Duke Nukem 3D passed away on June 16, 2026. May he rest in peace, and thank you for all the fun!
Poor guys
Bober
Do not the cat
Boss said not on my watch
It´s little undercooked yet
Parents are the best
Daughter only wants to be heard
This video can make grown man cry
Russian anti air missile, doing gods work
Bro has fallen, press F to pay respects
Removing shrapnel with a strong magnet, that's gonna leave a mark
Problem child
I used to have my breakfast on the rocks too, but I quit drinking
Need degenerate images in the comments
Referred a friend for a job. Now HR wants to interview me again
Dude really into swords
Hydrogen peroxide is used as paint remover. It will remove even a $15m paint job.
What TV show or movie represents this picture...
Boys will be boys
Pupper makes sure that his older sister gets pets at a dog daycare everyday
That was fun
Peace is not an option
One year ago in Scotland. Never forget.
Classic tomorrow problem
Wonder what other 'original' purposes have been... re-evaluated
The Moscow refinery in Kapotny today... "We pushed our luck..."
This is rare.
This generation is doomed
I Miss What This Place Used To Be.
We are a part of their life but they make us their whole world, cherish them while you still can
She should have made bacon cookies
Prosthetic legs took a massive step forward
Zidan watching his son play be like: "I have no son"
Circle of AI life
Guess how old he is
The owl of infinite luck wasn’t available. So here’s my gift to you degenerates, for the 5000 days here.
It was better when there was racism

A trick for parents
Everywhere...
Green

Terrible News

Not all heroes wear capes, some wear helmets and ride motorcycles. What a legend

80s avengers
I can't believe some people would prefer ketchup over this

Life choices
Are we doomed?

The moment that we all waiting for.. Japanese fans stayed behind at the AT&T Stadium in Dallas after the game to clean up the entire stadium.
